items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Cooler Master’s NR2 Pro MINI ITX desktop PC with an RTX 5070 down to $1,799.98 shipped. Don’t forget to clip the on-page coupon to see the discounted price during checkout. This machine typically goes for $2,244, so you’re essentially saving $444 on it today by clipping the on-page coupon. The listing highlighted here also includes a FREE 007 First Light game code worth $70, delivering more value for your money on top of the $444 discount. This is one of the most powerful Mini PCs you can get your hands on right now, featuring a Ryzen 7 7800X3D, 32GB RAM, 2TB SSD, and so on. What makes this deal particularly noteworthy is that Mini-ITX components like compact motherboards, power supplies, and cases often carry a premium over standard ATX hardware. Despite that, this setup is currently undercutting many similarly specced RTX 5070 desktops on the market. Head below for a closer look.
